title: Global semiconductor shortage — peak impact Q3/Q4 2021
description: The global semiconductor shortage reaches its most acute phase in Q3–Q4 2021. Chip lead times exceed 52 weeks. Auto manufacturers idle plants over missing $1–2 microcontrollers. Apple's Tim Cook quantifies a $6B revenue hit in Q4 FY2021. Ford loses $2.5B in 2021 profit. GM sells trucks missing chip-dependent features. Tesla rewrites FSD firmware to use alternative chips.
source: IHS Markit, Apple Q4 FY2021 earnings, Ford 2021 annual report
